chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH AT KARACHI C.P.No.D-2361 of 2021 --------------------------------------------------------------------------------------- DATE ORDER WITH SIGNATURE(S) OF JUDGE(S) ---------------------------------------------------------------------------------------- 1.For hearing of CMA No.10168/2021 2.For hearing of main case. 28.02.2025 Mr.Muhammad Adeel Awan, Advocate for the Petitioner. Ms.Alizeh Bashir, Assistant Attorney General. Mr.Muhammad Rashid, Advocate for Respondent (F.B.R) Learned counsel states that appeal is pending before the Customs Appellate Tribunal at Karachi and requests that pending decision therein the security may not be encashed. Learned counsel for the respondent Department has no cavil to the aforesaid and states that this petition may be disposed of in the said terms. Oder accordingly. Judge Judge nasir
